query: SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(config_value, '$.statCapHp') as statCapHp, JSON_EXTRACT(config_value, '$.statCapMp') as statCapMp, JSON_EXTRACT(config_value, '$.statCapAtk') as statCapAtk, JSON_EXTRACT(config_value, '$.statCapDef') as statCapDef, JSON_EXTRACT(config_value, '$.statCapSpd') as statCapSpd, JSON_EXTRACT(config_value, '$.statCapMatk') as statCapMatk, JSON_EXTRACT(config_value, '$.statCapMdef') as statCapMdef FROM game_config WHERE config_key = '__engine_config_v2__';
